description: Build the complete FastAPI backend with AI pipeline services: AI gateway (OpenAI-compatible multi-provider), script generation, text-to-speech (edge-tts), media sourcing (Pexels, Pixabay, Giphy), and video assembly (MoviePy/FFmpeg). Includes all API endpoints, project structure, dependencies, and configuration.
steps: Set Python 3.11 via pyenv local 3.11.15 in the project root
Install FFmpeg via apt-get install -y ffmpeg
Create backend/ directory structure: backend/app/__init__.py, backend/app/main.py, backend/app/config.py, backend/app/models/, backend/app/routers/, backend/app/services/
Create backend/pyproject.toml with dependencies: fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, openai, edge-tts, moviepy, pillow, python-dotenv, pydantic, aiofiles, pytest, pytest-asyncio

Create backend/app/config.py with Settings using pydantic-settings loading from .env: OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_BASE_URL, OPENAI_MODEL, PEXELS_API_KEY, PIXABAY_API_KEY, GIPHY_API_KEY, OUTPUT_DIR, TTS_VOICE
Create backend/.env.example with all required environment variables documented

Create backend/app/models/schemas.py with Pydantic models: VideoRequest (topic, duration, style), ScriptScene (narration, visual_description, duration), VideoScript (title, scenes list, total_duration), MediaItem (url, type, source, query), TTSResult (audio_path, duration), VideoResult (video_path, duration, scenes_count)

Create backend/app/services/ai_gateway.py - OpenAI-compatible gateway that supports multiple providers (OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, any OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Uses the openai Python library with configurable base_url and api_key. Includes streaming support, retry logic, and provider switching.

Create backend/app/services/script_generator.py - Uses ai_gateway to generate structured video scripts. Takes a topic and desired duration, crafts a system prompt that instructs the LLM to output a JSON VideoScript with scenes, narration text, visual descriptions, and timing. Parses the LLM JSON response into VideoScript model.

Create backend/app/services/tts_service.py - Uses edge-tts (Microsoft Edge free TTS) to convert narration text to audio. Generates one audio file per scene, returns paths and durations. Supports voice selection.

Create backend/app/services/media_sourcer.py - Searches for relevant GIFs and stock videos/images based on scene visual descriptions. Queries Pexels API (videos + photos), Pixabay API (videos + images), and Giphy API (GIFs). Downloads media files locally for video assembly. Implements fallback: if one API fails or has no results, tries the next.

Create backend/app/services/video_assembler.py - Uses MoviePy to combine audio (TTS) with visual media (downloaded images/videos/GIFs) into a final video. For each scene: overlays the scene's media on a background, adds the audio track, applies simple transitions (crossfade). Concatenates all scenes into the final output video with configurable resolution (1080x1920 for shorts, 1920x1080 for landscape).

Create backend/app/routers/videos.py with endpoints: POST /api/videos/generate-script (takes topic, returns editable script), POST /api/videos/generate-tts (takes script, returns audio info), POST /api/videos/source-media (takes script, returns media items), POST /api/videos/assemble (takes script + audio + media, assembles final video), GET /api/videos/{video_id}/status, GET /api/videos/{video_id}/download
Create backend/app/main.py - FastAPI app with CORS middleware (allow all origins for dev), include routers, static file serving for generated videos, startup/shutdown events
Create backend/tests/test_script_generator.py with tests for script generation (mock the AI gateway, verify output structure)
Create backend/tests/test_schemas.py with tests for Pydantic model validation
Create a top-level run.sh script that installs deps and starts the backend server
acceptance_criteria: Running 'pip install -e backend/' succeeds without errors
Starting the server with 'uvicorn backend.app.main:app' responds to GET /api/health with 200 OK
POST /api/videos/generate-script with a topic returns a structured VideoScript JSON (when API key is configured)
The ai_gateway service correctly initializes with configurable base_url supporting any OpenAI-compatible provider
edge-tts integration generates audio files from text
Media sourcer can query Pexels/Pixabay/Giphy APIs and download results
Video assembler produces a valid MP4 file from audio + media inputs
verification: Start server and curl http://localhost:8000/api/health returns 200
findings: MoviePy 2.x installed (not 1.x) - uses different import paths (from moviepy import X instead of from moviepy.editor). API methods changed: resize->resized, set_position->with_position, set_audio->with_audio, subclip->subclipped, no loop() method. FFmpeg installed via static binary (johnvansickle.com) since Amazon Linux 2023 lacks ffmpeg in yum repos. OpenAI client requires non-empty api_key to initialize - used 'not-configured' as placeholder when key is empty. pytest-asyncio 1.3.0 installed with asyncio_mode=auto in pyproject.toml.
